recommendations.title: Rattrapage
recommendations.overview: Guillaume and his friends have planned to attend the biggest electronic music festical to celebrate their passing school… but Guillaume has to take the test once again and has to go over everything over the weekend.

recommendations.title: A Good Doctor
recommendations.overview: On Christmas eve, Serge is the only on-call emergency doctor available. Struck by a crippling back-ache, he gets help from a pizza delivery boy who will need to step in the doctor's shoes.

recommendations.title: The Test
recommendations.overview: Annie lives in harmony with her husband Laurent and her children: the sensitive elders Maximilien and César; the younger Antoine whom Poupi, never-complaining teen, helps raising him. But a positive pregnancy test will disturb the harmony.

recommendations.title: For Better and for Worse

recommendations.title: Mohamed Dubois
recommendations.overview: Arnaud Dubois may be the heir to a bank, but he prefers to call himself Mohamed. Having fallen out with his father, he turns his back on the family residence. On his travels, he meets Mustafa, who introduces him to his sister Sabrina. Having fallen i

recommendations.title: A Trip to the Moon
recommendations.overview: Professor Barbenfouillis and five of his colleagues from the Academy of Astronomy travel to the Moon aboard a rocket propelled by a giant cannon. Once on the lunar surface, the bold explorers face the many perils hidden in the caves of the mysterious

recommendations.title: Bros Before Hos

recommendations.director: Steffen Haars, Flip van der Kuil

recommendations.title: The Intern
recommendations.overview: 70-year-old widower Ben Whittaker has discovered that retirement isn't all it's cracked up to be. Seizing an opportunity to get back in the game, he becomes a senior intern at an online fashion site, founded and run by Jules Ostin.

recommendations.title: Nelly and Monsieur Arnaud

recommendations.title: Diva
